user.title: Configuração do Robô iAqualink
user.description: Digite suas credenciais da conta iAquaLink.

data_description.name: Nome do seu robô de piscina no Home Assistant
data_description.username: Seu nome de usuário da conta iAquaLink
data_description.include_seconds_remaining: When enabled, the time-remaining sensor updates every poll interval (every few seconds) and includes seconds in its value. Disable to update only when the minute ticks over — this dramatically reduces Home Assistant activity-log entries during long cleaning cycles without slowing down remote-control button responsiveness. Can be toggled later via Configure.

select_device.title: Selecionar Robô
select_device.description: Selecione o robô a ser adicionado ao Home Assistant.

data_description.device: Escolha o robô que deseja adicionar
data_description.name: Opcional: Substituir o nome padrão deste robô

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate iAqualink Robot
reauth_confirm.description: Your iAquaLink credentials for {username} are no longer accepted. Enter the current password to resume the integration without losing entity history.

error.cannot_connect: Falha ao conectar ao serviço iAquaLink. Verifique suas credenciais e tente novamente.
error.no_devices: Nenhum robô encontrado em sua conta. Verifique se seu robô está devidamente registrado no iAquaLink.
error.device_not_found: O dispositivo selecionado não pôde ser encontrado. Tente novamente.
error.unknown: Ocorreu um erro inesperado. Tente novamente.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid iAquaLink credentials. Please check your username and password and try again.

abort.already_configured: Este robô já está configurado no Home Assistant.
abort.no_serial: No serial number was returned for this robot. The cloud account is reachable but the device list is empty or incomplete. Please try again later.
abort.reauth_successful: Reauthentication successful. The integration has resumed.
abort.reauth_unavailable: Reauthentication is no longer available for this entry (it may have been deleted). Please delete and re-add the integration if needed.

init.title: iAqualink Robot Options
init.description: Adjust runtime behavior for this robot.

data_description.include_seconds_remaining: When enabled, the time-remaining sensor updates every poll interval (every few seconds) and includes seconds in its value. Disable to update only when the minute ticks over — this dramatically reduces Home Assistant activity-log entries during long cleaning cycles without slowing down remote-control button responsiveness.

legacy_domain_migrated_restart_required.title: iAqualink Robots: domain rename — restart Home Assistant
legacy_domain_migrated_restart_required.description: The integration's internal domain has been renamed from `iaqualinkRobots` (camelCase) to `iaqualink_robots` (snake_case) to match the Home Assistant naming convention and resolve a long-standing hassfest warning. Your existing config entries, entities, devices, and history have been migrated automatically. Please **restart Home Assistant** to complete the migration and bring your robot back online under the new domain. After the restart your automations and dashboards should continue to work without changes. You can dismiss this notice once you've verified everything still works.

legacy_domain_migration_failed.title: iAqualink Robots: domain migration failed for {entry_title}
legacy_domain_migration_failed.description: The automatic migration from the legacy `iaqualinkRobots` domain to `iaqualink_robots` could not complete for this entry. The integration's data is unchanged but the entry will not load under the new domain. Manual recovery: go to **Settings → Devices & Services → iAqualink Robots**, click the 3-dot menu on the affected entry, choose **Delete**, then click **+ Add Integration** and re-add with your iAqualink credentials. Entity history for the affected entry may be lost. If the problem persists, please open a bug report including the integration log lines for `C7 migration failed`.

remote_rotate_right.description: Enviar comando de girar à direita para o robô para controle remoto (apenas robôs VR e VortraX)
